title: QosmicExperiment
description: One proposed CRO experiment. Pillar agents emit a JSON array of these (structured output). Validated by tools/qcrawl/experiments.py.

exp_id.description: Stable id; generate via experiments.make_exp_id(title, url) if absent.

url.description: URL of the affected surface (may be a new path).

evidence.description: An artifact path (pages/.../screenshot.png or .../page.html) or a URL. NEVER prose.

decision_rule.description: Ship condition, e.g. 'Ship if KPI improves without hurting bounce.'

confidence.description: Percent. Used to sort/select; calibrate honestly within your pillar.
